OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Kevin Bazant.
Attorney Marina Franco appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carol Ann Levine is present.
Attorney Joseph Wilson representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-19-2011 is vacated.
